assessmentQuestionVersion.name: Chemical Regulatory Requirements
assessmentQuestionVersion.responseValues: Coatings-Grade Durable Electronics-Grade Fast Evaporating FDA-Compliant Food-Grade High-Density High-Dielectric-Strength High-Gloss High-Opacity High-Purity High-Strength High-Temperature Long-Life Multi-Metal Compatible Non-Yellowing Additive Silicone-Based Thermally-Conductive Ultra-High-Purity USP-grade
